chunks.text: Compromised thinkers – having difficulty working through your many thoughts, making your next decision, deciding the next steps to achieving your goals. I have made dreams come true for younger people, older people, some with differing levels of intellectual difficulty. Come on a journey with me and I will show you how. What can I do to help you right now. Book a virtual meeting. Through our chats, training time and fun.

Together we will decide on the best fun activities you need. I will design a training course for you that will teach you the skills you want. Who can I help. I inspire and work with many learners: Compromised communicators – having difficulty getting your voice heard, using clear words that support your message and getting noticed in the crowd. Compromised doers – having difficulty doing what you want as quickly as you want, as quickly as others want or as quickly as the world wants.

I believe with my expertise I can help you learn and make your hopes and dreams come true. How will I help you. It is wonderful for us to have a great family support circle. It is also helpful to work with someone outside of that special circle. As a confidence coach and trainer, I can be that person. I can create learning experiences for you. I can guide you with coaching support choosing the right type of coaching for you. Coaching means we will have lots of chats.

I am Bernie Stevenson, confidence coach and trainer from Lucan, Dublin, Ireland. I am a good listener. I like helping people with an intellectual disability to sort things out. I treat those I work with, with total respect. I know how to coach you to your best success. What do I believe. I believe learning new things brings me success. I find a different learning experience for myself every day. I know taking time out of my day to learn is a good thing.

What can I do to help you right now. Email me and book a time to talk to me. I will plan a LIFE-LONG LEARNING ACTIVITY with you. Working with you I can help you get closer to your personal success.   Setting Goals It is easy to set goals. Join me for an exciting journey to set your own goals. Goals are

Home About Funding Supports Coaching Training Booking Contact Veri Login Select Page Bernie – Confidence Coach and Trainer Who am I.

Routines help us in the morning, during the day and in the evening. What can I do to help you right now. Send me an email, book a time to talk to me. I will plan a BUILDING ROUTINE ACTIVITY with you. Working with you I can help you get closer to your personal success.   Life-long Learning Learning helps us to be more confident. Learning shows us what we can do. Learning is about building on our skills. When we know the best way for us to learn; we learn more quickly.

Being stuck at home can lead to boredom. Boredom is a sign to stop doing what you are doing and do it differently or do something else. What can I do to help you right now. Send me an email and book a time to talk to me. I will plan an AVOID BOREDOM ACTIVITY with you. Working with you I can help you get closer to your personal success.   Building Routines Routines are how we organise ourselves to get things done. Routines help us put order on our day and our week.

You can contact me here for any questions you might have. Courses Courses for Intellectually Disabled All the training courses you have done in your life are very important. You can now do training with me while staying at home. We will mix the coaching chats with the courses. I will design the course so you will like it. The training will be fun. Together we will decide what is included in your training courses. Avoid Boredom We are staying home more to try to slow down the COVID virus.

## Contact
Home About Funding Supports Coaching Training Booking Contact Veri Login Select Page Contact Bernie – mentor for people with a disability It is good to be in touch I am Bernie Stevenson, mentor for people with a disability from Train for Success and I am delighted to hear from you to see how I can help. Many of the queries I receive relate to information already covered on my website.

I ran a Life Skills programme through Lions Club International and Eve Holdings. I am a master trainer delivering management training to civil servants. My qualifications include: Diploma in Personal and Business Executive Coaching. Diploma in Equality and Diversity from NUI Galway. BA in Training Consultancy from NCI.

For 30 years I have coached learners with an intellectual difficulty. I am a mentor with Special Olympics Ireland. I set up the Dublin 15, Hot Fuzz Leadership Group for young people with an intellectual difficulty. I am garda vetted under the National Vetting Bureau. I understand the concept of independent living having worked with members of the Centre for Independent Living. I am a qualified personal and business coach for 20 years.

I have made dreams come true for younger people, older people, some with differing levels of intellectual difficulty. Come on a journey with me and I will show you how. What can I do to help you right now. Book a virtual meeting. Through our chats, training time and fun activities I will help you realise your potential. I will show you the best way to use your wonderful skills and talents to reach your best goals. Book a Virtual Meeting More about me What else would you like to know.

I inspire and work with many learners: Compromised communicators – having difficulty getting your voice heard, using clear words that support your message and getting noticed in the crowd. Compromised doers – having difficulty doing what you want as quickly as you want, as quickly as others want or as quickly as the world wants. Compromised thinkers – having difficulty working through your many thoughts, making your next decision, deciding the next steps to achieving your goals.

As a confidence coach and trainer, I can be that person. I can create learning experiences for you. I can guide you with coaching support choosing the right type of coaching for you. Coaching means we will have lots of chats. Together we will decide on the best fun activities you need. I will design a training course for you that will teach you the skills you want. Who can I help.

I know how to coach you to your best success. What do I believe. I believe learning new things brings me success. I find a different learning experience for myself every day. I know taking time out of my day to learn is a good thing. I believe with my expertise I can help you learn and make your hopes and dreams come true. How will I help you. It is wonderful for us to have a great family support circle. It is also helpful to work with someone outside of that special circle.
